plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review code changes against SOLID, Clean Code, DRY, KISS, YAGNI, project patterns, security, and performance

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Suggest conventional commit messages based on actual git diff analysis

plugins.name: create-adr
plugins.description: Create Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for documenting important technical decisions

plugins.name: create-ticket
plugins.description: Create planning tickets (simple or epic) for feature requests, bugs, and enhancements

plugins.name: ideate
plugins.description: Brainstorm and validate new feature ideas before they become tickets

plugins.name: implement
plugins.description: Implement features, fix bugs, or debug issues following a structured 6-phase implementation model

plugins.name: investigate
plugins.description: Investigate issues in staging or local environments using Grafana (Prometheus + Loki)

plugins.name: project-status
plugins.description: Show current project status from planning files with milestone progress and open tickets

plugins.name: refine-ticket
plugins.description: Refine planning tickets to implementation-ready detail with data models, mockups, and validation rules

plugins.name: scaffold-feature
plugins.description: Generate a complete new feature from scratch by scaffolding all boilerplate files following established patterns
